name: The Main Hall
description:
You stand in a huge room, with smooth white walls, burned in some places,
some kind of light iluminates this place, you can't really see from where it
comes from, scary...  This must be the First Hall considering all the chairs
and tables, and also this light...  Here you hear the scholars warcry, this
horrible sound seems to go forever....  You see shadows moving near the walls.
The room becomes a corridor to the north, and to small rooms to east and west.
